stem: The motor vehicle registration shall be renewed: 车牌重新注册的时限是
options: every six months 每六个月
every year 每年
every three years 每三年
every month 每月
stem_en: The motor vehicle registration shall be renewed:
stem_zh: 车牌重新注册的时限是

stem: If you drink four 12 ounce bottles of beer you will have about as much alcohol in your system as if you drank: 饮四瓶 12 盎司容量啤酒，相当于其他的酒是
options: 12 ounces of table wine 12盎司淡酒
1 drink of whiskey or gin 1杯威士忌或松子酒
4 drinks of whiskey or gin 4杯威士忌或松子酒
4 ounces of table wine 4盎司淡酒
stem_en: If you drink four 12 ounce bottles of beer you will have about as much alcohol in your system as if you drank:
stem_zh: 饮四瓶 12 盎司容量啤酒，相当于其他的酒是

stem: New Jersey law states that you may or may not be under the influence if your blood alcohol content is: 新泽西法律规定，你血液中酒精含量在什么范围内可能不受酒精影响
options: more than .10% but less than .15% 大于 0.1%但小于 0.15%
more than .15% but less than .20% 大于 0.15%但小于 0.2%
more than .05% but less than .10% 大于 0.05%但小于 0.1%
all of the above 以上皆是
stem_en: New Jersey law states that you may or may not be under the influence if your blood alcohol content is:
stem_zh: 新泽西法律规定，你血液中酒精含量在什么范围内可能不受酒精影响

stem: You may drive on public or private property to avoid a traffic or signal: 你可以驾车于公共或私人产地以避开交通信号，条件是
options: only if the driver stops the vehicle before crossing the sidewalk 只有在人行横道线前停下
only with permission of the property owner 只有在私人产地主人准许之下
anytime 任何时间
when directed to do so by police officer 当你在警察指挥下
stem_en: You may drive on public or private property to avoid a traffic or signal:
stem_zh: 你可以驾车于公共或私人产地以避开交通信号，条件是
options_en: only if the driver stops the vehicle before crossing the sidewalk
only with permission of the property owner
when directed to do so by police officer
options_zh: 只有在人行横道线前停下
只有在私人产地主人准许之下

stem: During bad weather, the two-second rule should be increased to: 在天气恶劣的情况下，车距保持两秒钟的规定应增加到
options: five to six seconds 5-6秒
six to seven seconds 6-7秒
two to three seconds 2-3秒
three to four seconds 3-4秒
stem_en: During bad weather, the two-second rule should be increased to:
stem_zh: 在天气恶劣的情况下，车距保持两秒钟的规定应增加到

stem: What does this sign mean? 这个标志是什么意思？
options: Take route 45 at night 在晚上走45号公路
45 mph is the minimum speed limit 45英里/小时是最低速度限制
The maximum speed limit is 45 mph 最高时速限制为45英里
You can drive up to 45 mph when driving at night 夜间驾驶时速最高可达 45 英里/小时
options_en: 45 mph is the minimum speed limit
The maximum speed limit is 45 mph
You can drive up to 45 mph when driving at night
options_zh: 夜间驾驶时速最高可达 45 英里/小时

stem: What does this sign indicate? 这个标志表示什么？
options: A steep hill/steep descent, drive with care 陡峭的山坡/陡峭的下坡，小心驾驶
A slow-moving vehicle 一辆缓慢行驶的车辆
A tow truck 一辆拖车
A slippery road 一条湿滑的路
options_en: A steep hill/steep descent, drive with care
options_zh: 陡峭的山坡/陡峭的下坡，小心驾驶

stem: Locked wheel skids are usually caused by: 锁定的车轮打滑通常是由以下原因造成的
options: Braking too hard at a high speed 在高速状态下刹车过猛
Pressing the gas and brake pedal at the same time 同时踩下油门和刹车踏板
Ignition turned to the lock position while the vehicle is still in motion 车辆仍在行驶中，点火器转到锁定位置
Drive wheels losing traction with the road surface 驱动轮失去与路面的牵引力
stem_en: Locked wheel skids are usually caused by:
stem_zh: 锁定的车轮打滑通常是由以下原因造成的
options_en: Braking too hard at a high speed
Pressing the gas and brake pedal at the same time
Ignition turned to the lock position while the vehicle is still in motion
Drive wheels losing traction with the road surface
options_zh: 在高速状态下刹车过猛
同时踩下油门和刹车踏板
车辆仍在行驶中，点火器转到锁定位置
驱动轮失去与路面的牵引力
notes: auto-detected: D_zh has long English run (53+ chars)

stem: If there is another driver tailgating you, you should NOT: 如果另一个司机紧贴跟着你的车，你不应该
options: Provide more space to allow them to pass 提供空间让其超车
Increase your speed 加速
Move to the right lane 并向右侧车道
reduce your speed 减速
stem_en: If there is another driver tailgating you, you should NOT:
stem_zh: 如果另一个司机紧贴跟着你的车，你不应该
options_en: Provide more space to allow them to pass

stem: Cell phones may not be used while driving except for: 开车时不许使用手机，除非
options: Fire emergencies 火警
Life-threatening situations 生命垂危
Traffic accidents 发生交通事故
All of the above 以上皆是
stem_zh: 开车时不许使用手机，除非
